# Kritano

> Kritano is a website health auditing platform that analyses sites across six pillars: accessibility, SEO, security, performance, content quality, and AI readiness.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://kritano.com/)
- [Services](https://kritano.com/services)
- [Pricing](https://kritano.com/pricing)
- [About](https://kritano.com/about)
- [Contact](https://kritano.com/contact)
- [Blog](https://kritano.com/blog)

## What Kritano Does
Kritano audits websites and produces actionable reports covering:
- Accessibility (WCAG compliance, screen reader compatibility, colour contrast, keyboard navigation)
- SEO (meta tags, structured data, indexability, Core Web Vitals)
- Security (HTTPS, headers, mixed content, vulnerability detection)
- Performance (page speed, resource optimisation, render-blocking assets)
- Content Quality (readability, E-E-A-T signals, content structure)
- AI Readiness (schema markup, structured data, AI crawler accessibility)

## Key Facts
- Founded by Chris Garlick
- Based in the United Kingdom
- Serves businesses, agencies, and developers who want to improve their website health
- Provides PDF and CSV audit exports
- Offers free and paid audit tiers
